description: Candidate-specific disabled source templates for global_core ETF evidence collection. No network fetch and no verification by default.

fund_metadata.source_name: FTAW provider product page to collect
fund_metadata.source_guidance: Collect provider product page or provider factsheet for FTAW fund metadata.

fee_metadata.source_name: FTAW provider factsheet or KIID to collect
fee_metadata.source_guidance: Collect provider factsheet or KIID for FTAW fee metadata.

distribution_policy.source_name: FTAW distribution policy source to collect
distribution_policy.source_guidance: Collect provider product page/factsheet showing FTAW distribution policy.

platform_availability.source_name: FTAW Lightyear account availability evidence to collect
platform_availability.source_guidance: Collect account-specific Lightyear screenshot or account-specific manual note. Do not place an order.

tax_route.source_name: FTAW manual tax/account route note to collect
tax_route.source_guidance: Manual tax/account route review required before any future status request.

exposure_data.source_name: FTAW exposure data source to collect
exposure_data.source_guidance: Collect provider holdings/country/sector page or factsheet for FTAW exposure data.

market_data.source_name: FTAW public market data page to collect
market_data.source_guidance: Collect public market data page with price, currency, source, and as_of date.
